title: Lands of Eclipsia - Official Modpack
description: The official modpack for Lands of Eclipsia, featuring enhanced exploration, MMO-like systems, optimized performance, and full multiplayer integration.
body:
## # 🌌 Lands of Eclipsia - Official Modpack

Welcome to **Lands of Eclipsia**, the official modpack required to connect to our immersive multiplayer server!  
This pack brings optimized performance, stunning visuals, and a variety of mods that expand exploration, combat, magic, and adventure.

---

## ✨ Features
- 🌍 **Enhanced World Generation** → Explore breathtaking new biomes, dungeons, and structures.
- ⚔️ **Epic Boss Battles** → Face powerful creatures and unique challenges across the world.
- 🏰 **MMO-Like Experience** → Claim lands, manage resources, and interact with a living economy.
- 🎨 **Optimized Visuals** → Shader-ready support with performance-focused tweaks.
- 🛠️ **Server-Synced Mods** → All required mods to seamlessly connect to the **Lands of Eclipsia** server.

---

## 🔗 Multiplayer Integration
This modpack is designed to work **exclusively** with the official **Lands of Eclipsia** server.  
Once installed, simply join and enjoy a fully customized experience with friends!

### **Server IP:** landsofeclipsia.exaroton.me  


---

## 📌 Recommendations
- Use the latest version of **Java 21** for better performance.
- Allocate at least **4GB of RAM** to avoid crashes and stuttering.
- Enable shaders for the best experience! 🎨

---
